final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional food photography shot of a meticulously plated French Michelin three-star main course — sous-vide duck breast with truffle sauce.

Style/medium: professional commercial food photography, macro close-up with shallow depth of field, high color saturation, editorial food magazine aesthetic
Composition: macro close-up framing, extreme shallow depth of field, precise focus on duck breast cross-section texture, shallow angle perspective
Subject: sous-vide duck breast sliced in neat arrangement, golden-brown crispy skin, pink juicy interior, fresh black truffle slices on top
Scene/backdrop: dark marble countertop, fine dining luxury restaurant atmosphere, white bone china plate
Lighting/mood: dramatic side lighting from left, highlighting texture and gloss, warm and luxurious mood
Color palette: rich golden-brown duck skin, pink meat interior, deep purple chicory, vibrant orange micro carrots, dark marble as neutral base
Materials/textures: crispy caramelized skin with visible texture, juicy meat fibers, glossy truffle sauce brush strokes, delicate edible flower petals
Avoid: flat lighting, oversaturated colors, plastic-looking food, deformed plate edges, watermark, generic stock photo aesthetic
